supabase.program_description: Supabase CLI - local development and deployment

init.description: Initializes a new Supabase project in the current directory [citation:4][citation:9]

start.description: Starts the Supabase local development stack (requires Docker) [citation:4][citation:9]
commands: supabase start -x gotrue,imgproxy  # exclude certain services

stop.description: Stops the Supabase local development stack [citation:4][citation:9]

status.description: Shows the status and connection info for the local stack [citation:4][citation:9]
commands: supabase status -o env  # output as environment variables

link.description: Links your local project to a remote Supabase project [citation:4][citation:9]

push.description: Pushes your local schema changes to the remote project [citation:9]
commands: supabase db push --dry-run  # preview what will happen

pull.description: Pulls the latest schema from the remote project [citation:9]

reset.description: Resets the local database and reapplies all migrations [citation:9]

diff.description: Generates a migration from your local schema changes [citation:9]

generate-types.description: Generates TypeScript types from your database schema [citation:9]

functions.description: Commands for managing Supabase Edge Functions [citation:9]
